The bigger issue might be that regulators want to see financial activity tied to the company license A mainland LLC that runs only on cash leaves no clear audit trail From a compliance perspective immigration probably treats that as a risk signal rather than a missing document Opening a company account and running even basic transactions through it might solve the renewal problem later but the expired visa situation likely needs a legal status fix first

We did start invoicing some clients through my sole investor personal account and highlighted these to immigration along with invoices that reflect real business operations but still company bank statement required I was hoping that opening a company account would please them enough but due to expired ID 1st March banks cannot do it

Nothing can be done in this situation other than pay the company to uograde the insurance plan Dont think of getting a personal policy it will look good on paper but all pre existing conditions will have a waiting period
Just dont get sick here thats what i do

You can pay for the upgraded plan if those hospitals are nearby to your residence Otherwise the Rn2 is a decent plan yes the network is a lot compromised You can use reimbursement also but that will be a lengthy process and also the reimbursement will be as per the applicable network rates so if consultation in aster is 100 and mediclinic its 1000 aed they will femiubrse as per aster 100 aed
Usually employer can upgrade at your cost you need to talk to person in company who handles insurance they always allow to add family members or higher package if you pay
Check the price difference with your company and pay for the upgrade

You could take another medical policy for you and your family This would be on the expensive side as its an individual policy and GN is a top tier network also not a group policy where the risk is pooled Try to speak to your insurance broker if there is one for an upgrade to GN tier 1 plan This would be under the discretion of your employer and subject to filling of a medical application form and approval from the insurer On insurance policy renewal try to request your employer to upgrade you to tier 1 with additional cost perhaps been arrange by you Complaining to the DHA wouldnt do much as companies are mandated to provided insurance as the basic plan which is the bare minimum from what I can judge your plan is well over the basic plan Sorry for this buddy although this is a way of cost containment for insurance policies

for question 4 yes you can go outofnetwork and claim reimbursement but nextcare makes it painful on purpose youll need to pay upfront submit the claim with all receipts and doctor reports and then wait 36 weeks reimbursement is usually 80 of their approved rate which is often lower than what the hospital actually charged so you end up eating maybe 3040 of the cost honestly the topup insurance route is probably your best bet look into oman insurance or orient insurance individual plans they have addons specifically designed to extend restricted networks runs about 24k aedyear depending on what you add not cheap but way better than paying full price at american hospital every time you need something also fwiw the verbal promise thing is worth a MOHRE complaint even without written proof they take these cases seriously and the company knows it you probably wont get the tier upgrade but it might make them a bit more cooperative

It would be difficult for the company to obtain separate cover for you unless they have higher plans for more senior staff which they d an upgrade you to Probably you dan negotiate to pay the premiums difference

Why do you think a certain someone wants to build distributed data centers in space Its not about being cost effective Not to say that it can definitely be done but if it can be made to work at whatever cost it will hold one key advantage Its about making your AI compute capacity orders of magnitude harder to target and destroy than that of the competition in the AI wars of the future

Space based data centers would be a bad idea strategically though Sure you make it harder to hit but militarizing low earth orbit in any way past the tacitly accepted but quite vulnerable spy sats risks kessler syndrome

Low earth orbit is already militarized Starlink is already an indispensable comms advantage in modern warfare and already a Kessler Syndrome threat if an enemy state decided to try and do serious damage to it at scale
Doesnt that make the security of space based compute worse
How Kessler Syndrome threat is almost as helpful as MAD nobody wants to test it out for realsies Thats a plus in the allornone psychosis of the ultra powerful

I had my Golden Visa Process done recently but had graduated from uni of Birmingham based in Dubai But I guess the process is similar you would require an equivalency certificate from your university for a GPA out of 4 Equivalency Certificate Transcript and Degree Certificate needs to be attested by MOHESR through their website which take 50dhs per document After that you need to apply for nomination through icp site or app where all these documents along with existing Emirates ID copy Passport Copy Passport size photo are uploaded with all the information which they ask to be filled out Once upon receiving nomination approval you would require to go to an Amer Center and submit the approval screenshot emirates id and passport copy Once a second residency approval is received you proceed for medical test and upon the result you proceed for current visa cancellation Upon cancellation the visa will automatically be changed and then can pay for the emirates ID

Yes I got the equivalency from my University You can take all the documents to Amer and have them do the icp approval as well Regarding the attestation please recheck with Amer if MOFA is enough for degree certificate or if you need to have it attested by MOHESR again The whole process takes around 12 weeks

I think you need First Class but do recheck I have a 21 and I was turned down Also check with your university for the GPA conversion and theres another company called WES who will also do it for you This is based on my current understanding but please verify the details for yourself

Hi thank you so much for your reply Just a couple questions so the equivalency certificate I just ask frommy university Degree is already attested so I guess need to get the other two attested once attested can I not take all the documents directly to Amir Center or I have to apply online on the ICP app Also how long did this whole procedure take Thank you in advance

I believe the degree equivalency has to be done by the Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research Do contact them This is based on my current understanding but please verify the details for yourself

Great that you have the degree already attested thats the hardest part done On your two questions 1 Transcript attestation From recent applicants the attested degree certificate is usually sufficient for the initial application However Amer centers sometimes ask for the transcript as a supporting document even if not officially required Safe move bring the unattested transcript with you anyway if they want it attested theyll tell you and you can do it after 2 GPA conversion for UK degrees This is the tricky part ICA does not officially publish a UK grade conversion table What most UK applicants have done is get a WES World Education Services evaluation or a similar credential evaluation that converts your 21 to a GPA equivalent A 21 from Manchester typically converts to 3537 depending on the method used Your 6566 is borderline but a 21 from a Russell Group university like Manchester is generally wellregarded Some applicants with similar profiles have been approved without a formal GPA conversion others were asked for one Its genuinely inconsistent Practical advice go to the Amer center this week as planned Explain your situation show what you have Amer officers deal with this regularly and will tell you exactly whats missing rather than rejecting outright Good luck Manchester should be comfortably in the Top 100 list ICA uses
Is the mofa attestation for my degree enough or require another one Plus thank you so much for the help

Thanks for raising this and for sharing the sources A couple of points that may help add context Movements of private wealth or portfolio allocation decisions happen regularly in global markets and are not connected to how exchanges operate or whether trading is available ADX market operations follow established regulatory procedures designed to maintain orderly trading and investor protection during unusual circumstances Its also worth noting that individual service disruptions at banks or technology providers dont necessarily reflect the status of the exchange itself or the broader financial system For anyone looking for confirmed updates about ADX trading schedules or market operations the most reliable source will always be the official announcements published by ADX Happy to help clarify if there are specific questions about how the exchange operates
